channel.title: TSM — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on TSM (Taiwan Semi) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: EXITED TSM (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) exited TSM in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: François Rochon: TRIMMED TSM (-96%) · Q4 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) trimmed TSM in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
